commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=7568473ca7c745a6223f53f49d2388aa6d4b667b)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a structured Doctor health finding for legacy sandbox registry files, dry-run repair effects for migrate/remove/quarantine outcomes, and contribution-ordered Doctor lint plumbing/docs.

PR surface: Source -22, Tests +586, Docs +2. Total +566 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the compatibility finding by source inspection: the PR emits warning-level sandbox registry findings and the lint path exits nonzero for findings at the selected threshold. This is otherwise a feature PR, so no separate bug reproduction applies.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs maintainer compatibility judgment, stacked-parent handling, and contributor proof rather than a narrow automated repair.

target.title: Doctor: expose sandbox registry findings
target.body:
## Summary

- Exposes legacy sandbox registry files as structured doctor health findings.
- Adds dry-run repair effects for migrate, remove-empty, and quarantine registry-file outcomes.
- Keeps the existing doctor:sandbox legacy run path as the only real mutating sandbox registry migration path for normal doctor / doctor --fix.
- Declares the structured check inline on the existing ordered doctor contribution, so this PR does not add another core registry entry.

This is intentionally the small sandbox registry slice from the older doctor repair stack. It does not migrate sandbox image builds, namespace probes, Docker checks, or plugin-sensitive doctor rules.

## Stack

Stacked on #86627. The only new sandbox commit in this PR is `7568473ca7c`; the sandbox delta is 4 files.

## Current Head

Rebased and signed head: `7568473ca7c`.

## Validation

- `git diff --check`
- `node node_modules/oxfmt/bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/commands/doctor-sandbox.ts src/commands/doctor-sandbox.warns-sandbox-enabled-without-docker.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `node node_modules/oxlint/bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/commands/doctor-sandbox.ts src/commands/doctor-sandbox.warns-sandbox-enabled-without-docker.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental false --pretty false`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --noEmit --incremental false --pretty false`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor-sandbox.warns-sandbox-enabled-without-docker.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts --reporter=dot --pool=forks --testTimeout=30000 --hookTimeout=30000` (2 files, 48 tests)
- 2026-06-03 refresh on signed head `7568473ca7c`: `git diff --check`; targeted `oxlint`; `pnpm exec vitest run --project commands src/commands/doctor-sandbox.warns-sandbox-enabled-without-docker.test.ts`; `pnpm exec vitest run --project commands src/commands/doctor-lint.test.ts`; `pnpm exec vitest run --project unit src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts`.
- 2026-06-03 replayed onto fixed #86627 base; signed head `7568473ca7c`.
- 2026-06-03 replayed onto refreshed #86627 head `9efab809787`; signed head `7568473ca7c`.
target.author: giodl73-repo
